prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6) engine with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, and a Tomei 4-2-1 titanium exhaust manifold for optimized spool and top-end power (targeting 500whp on E85)

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-position rebound damping, adjustable top mounts, and linear rate springs (8K front, 10K rear) paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) for track-focused handling

OS Giken Super Lock LSD with 2.2-way differential and 45% lockup under power, combined with a Nismo 370Z-specific carbon driveshaft and AP Racing CP9460 front brake calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads
estetica: Veilside Fortune 370Z widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, finished in Nissan Racing Yellow (code: M3Y) with matte black accents
Voltex Type-5 rear wing with adjustable carbon fiber blades (30mm chord) and integrated third brake light, mounted on a custom aluminum subframe for rigidity

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x10.5 +15 front, 19x12 +20 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear), paired with Muteki SR48 lug nuts and extended wheel studs
